notes: Removed explicit Lovable dependency and cleaned top-level lockfile entry.
Replaced Lovable Vite wrapper with explicit Vite plugin composition.
Removed Lovable-specific runtime error integration and replaced it with generic error reporting.
Hardened Supabase initialization to fail fast on missing environment variables and removed insecure hardcoded fallbacks.
Added server-side admin access enforcement for admin UI and admin operations.
Added review creation ownership validation to ensure users can only create reviews for their own orders.
